missingQuestions.question: Who are the exact users or stakeholders affected by this work?
missingQuestions.reason: The brief does not name the real-world user group.

missingQuestions.question: What measurable outcome proves this work succeeded?
missingQuestions.reason: No success metric or OKR is stated.

missingQuestions.question: Is there a real deadline, launch window, or external dependency?
Who owns the final decision, and which teams must coordinate?
missingQuestions.reason: Decision rights and coordination load are missing.

engagedSpecialists.name: Virtual Workflow PM
engagedSpecialists.reason: Selected for brief coverage: Owns workflow handoff quality, stage contracts, and delivery sequencing for product work.

engagedSpecialists.name: Virtual Version PM
engagedSpecialists.reason: Selected for brief coverage: Owns release-facing version records, version planning documents, and change tracking.

engagedSpecialists.name: Virtual User Research PM
engagedSpecialists.reason: Selected for brief coverage: Owns user analysis, persona updates, problem framing, and user evidence synthesis.

engagedSpecialists.name: Virtual Roadmap PM
engagedSpecialists.reason: Selected for brief coverage: Owns roadmap outputs, milestone framing, and version planning synthesis.

engagedSpecialists.name: Virtual Review PM
engagedSpecialists.reason: Selected for brief coverage: Owns product review gates, issue framing, and product-facing quality decisions.

engagedSpecialists.name: Virtual Requirements PM
engagedSpecialists.reason: Selected for brief coverage: Owns requirement intake, requirement cards, requirement evaluation feedback, and requirement traceability.

engagedSpecialists.name: Virtual Industry Research PM
engagedSpecialists.reason: Selected for brief coverage: Builds long-cycle industry understanding through daily reports, weekly briefs, and special research reports.

engagedSpecialists.name: Virtual Documentation PM
engagedSpecialists.reason: Selected for brief coverage: Owns AI-generated manuals, demo scripts, sync documents, and structured product communication outputs.

learningGuidance.title: Separate solution complexity from coordination complexity
learningGuidance.recommendation: Estimate the work using AI-first effort, coordination load, external dependency, and confidence.
learningGuidance.whyNow: The version plan requires AI-speed estimation rather than historical human-only pacing.

learningGuidance.title: Apply build-vs-buy before custom implementation
learningGuidance.recommendation: Run open-source and external-pattern scouting before approving strategic build work.
learningGuidance.whyNow: The review gate and v0.5 plan require external pattern scouting for strategic proposals.

requiredGovernedOutputs.title: Physical-world profile update
requiredGovernedOutputs.reason: Missing organizational context should be captured before committing scope.

requiredGovernedOutputs.title: External pattern and open-source scouting
requiredGovernedOutputs.reason: Strategic proposals must check reusable external patterns before custom build work.

requiredGovernedOutputs.title: Page-by-page image2 prompt pack
requiredGovernedOutputs.reason: Visual design delivery must first produce a page-by-page image2 prompt pack before final design images are generated.

requiredGovernedOutputs.title: Strategic radar
requiredGovernedOutputs.reason: Agent patterns, frameworks, and skill ecosystems should be watched before platform investment decisions.

requiredGovernedOutputs.title: Version planning document
requiredGovernedOutputs.reason: The work must map into version scope, acceptance, and rollout sequence.

requiredGovernedOutputs.title: Roadmap planning document
requiredGovernedOutputs.reason: Roadmap planning should be generated from active requirements and version traces.

requiredGovernedOutputs.title: Daily intelligence report
requiredGovernedOutputs.reason: Daily intelligence should summarize active requirement/version movement and new evidence gaps.

requiredGovernedOutputs.title: Weekly product brief
requiredGovernedOutputs.reason: Weekly briefs should roll up product progress, risks, and next decisions from governed context.

requiredGovernedOutputs.title: Learning and cognitive upgrade memo
requiredGovernedOutputs.reason: Recurring operator blind spots should be converted into explicit learning guidance.

requiredGovernedOutputs.title: Demo script
requiredGovernedOutputs.reason: Demo scripts should be generated from accepted capabilities, operator flows, and version state.

requiredGovernedOutputs.title: User manual
requiredGovernedOutputs.reason: User manuals should be generated from governed capability/version state rather than ad-hoc notes.

requiredGovernedOutputs.title: External skill/plugin/framework evaluation
requiredGovernedOutputs.reason: External skills, plugins, and frameworks need governed adopt/adapt/watch/reject/build evaluation before adoption.

nextActions: Answer or explicitly waive the missing physical-world questions.
Assign engaged specialist agents to generate governed outputs.
Run ecosystem/open-source scouting before approving strategic build work.
Create UI schema/business-block specs before frontend implementation when the work changes operator surfaces.
